review_text: The dashboard is clean and setup was quick. I had my sensors connected in 10 minutes and the automation rules worked perfectly.
After the last update the app keeps freezing when I open camera feeds. Very frustrating and not usable during the evening rush.
Classes are good overall, but billing was confusing and I was charged twice this month.
Customer service resolved my lost card issue in one call. Honestly impressed with how fast they handled it.
The exchange rates were okay, but the card got declined twice in Singapore and support chat took forever.
The analytics module helped our team spot slow-moving stock quickly. Exporting reports is simple and reliable.
